title: Outer Harness run record
description: One JSON object per line in runs.jsonl. Append-only. Each row records a single agent run (or a meaningful sub-event such as task_created).

task_id.description: Matches a directory name under .harness/tasks/. Use 'unscoped' if no task is active.

agent.description: Identifier for the agent harness, e.g. claude-code, codex-cli, cursor

model.description: Model id used for the run, e.g. claude-opus-4-6

input_tokens.description: Total input tokens consumed in the run. 0 if unknown.

output_tokens.description: Total output tokens generated in the run. 0 if unknown.

session_id.description: Free-form session identifier so multiple rows from the same session can be grouped.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the run in seconds. Optional.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes; useful for task_created rows or describing failures.
